label: Media Archive
positive_tail: archival documentary still, careful restoration texture, tactile paper and film materials, grounded natural lighting
image_grade_tail: subtle archival patina, clean readable composition
announcer_visual_subject: archive presenter at a catalog table with labeled boxes and a restored microphone
music_visual_subject: archival audio equipment and labeled reels arranged for restoration
scene_open_subject: archive workroom with film cans, paper labels, and careful preservation tools
character_portrait_style: documentary portrait in an archive setting

motion_prompts.announcer: Continuous shot, same catalog table throughout. Slow documentary push-in across labeled archive boxes. Paper labels flutter faintly. Dust motes drift in window light.
motion_prompts.music_open: Continuous shot, same restoration bench throughout. Reels begin to turn. Tape threads through guides. Gentle dolly push toward the spinning hub.
motion_prompts.music_close: Continuous shot, same restoration bench throughout. Reels slow to a stop. Tape settles. Light dims across labeled canisters. Slow dolly pull back.
motion_prompts.music_inter: Continuous shot, same shelf of labeled reels throughout. Slow lateral drift along the shelf. Handwritten labels pass in and out of focus.
